title: BetterGuard
description: BetterGuard: Protection / Anti-Cheat / Anti-X-Ray / SOLEA API Compatible: Protect your servers from cheaters
body:
![BetterGuard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07f445a0cdf3c531a8a5ead9a7bd6c62af12be10.png)
# BetterGuard

**Server-side** anti-cheat for Minecraft **1.21.1** — Fabric & NeoForge.

Players do **not** need the mod on their client. Drop the JAR in your **server** `mods` folder and you're set.

---

## Why BetterGuard?

A cleaner survival or PvP server without forcing everyone to install a client-side anti-cheat pack. BetterGuard runs **on the server** and watches movement, combat, the world, and banned client mods.

---

## What's active today

**Movement** — speed, fly, nofall, high jump, jesus, timer, motion prediction

**Combat** — reach, killaura, autoclicker

**World** — fastbreak, nuker, scaffold, bedrock break in survival

**X-Ray & vision** — Advanced X-Ray (including ESP-style overlays), freecam, network channel scanning; decoy ores for classic block-removal X-Ray

**Network** — invalid packets (bad positions/rotation)

**Profiles** — `STRICT` · `NORMAL` · `LENIENT`
---

## Staff commands (OP)
```
/bg reset <player>
/bg bypass <player> true|false
/bg profile STRICT|NORMAL|LENIENT
/bg reload
/bg whitelist add|remove|list <modId>
/bg help
